item.description: CTF’s (Capture the flag) are cybersecurity competitions organized by Universities, Security companies for various reasons but I play them for fun. I like to solve reverse engineering, Pwn and occasionally hardware challenges too. I play CTF’s when idle, which is quite rare these days. As a core member of 7h3B14ckKn1gh75 and ffffx00000, I’ve organized and participated in a lot of CTF’s. I won the recent HackTheBox Cyberapocalypse CTF 2022 in Top 50 (43rd out of 7024) in the world and 4th in RSA CTF.
I’ll be posting about my writeups and research soon.
